description: Asia is the world’s largest industrial robot market. In 2024, 401,665 units were installed,up 5% year over year. 74% of all newly deployed robots were installed in Asia (2023:70%). From 2019 to 2024, annual robot installations grew by 10% on average each year.Three of the top five markets for industrial robots are in Asia: China is by far the largest market. More than every other robot (54%) installed worldwide in 2024 ended up in China: Installations were up 7% to 295,045 units.
